examples: Glass hives offer a close-up view of the bees at work, with the queen bee in each hive marked by a white dot.
If you're helping out with the bee hives, pay attention.
I switched to traditional medicine and all the hives disappeared, together with my itching.
He has a dozen or so hives around the area and others in different parts of the city.
Since childhood, Amy had suffered from severe allergies, which could manifest as hives or eczema.
